title: .NET Backend Developer Intern
description: Bluesense is a cutting-edge AI company specializing in artificial intelligence, computer vision, and machine learning. We build AI-driven products and provide AI integration and consultancy services, transforming data science and deep learning into practical solutions for real-world problems. Our work connects with innovation ecosystems and product initiatives such as a Smart Beauty App, aligned with communities like Harvard Innovation Labs (Harvard University) and ITU ARI Teknokent / ARI Çekirdek. This is a full-time remote, unpaid compulsory internship role for a .NET Backend Developer at Bluesense. The intern will contribute to real product development by building and improving backend services using C# and ASP.NET Core, focusing on clean architecture, reliable APIs, and scalable system design. You’ll work on: Building and maintaining RESTful APIs for production-style applications Designing and implementing backend services, business logic, and data workflows Working with databases and optimizing data access layers Ensuring system reliability, performance, and security best practices Collaborating with a remote team through task tracking, code reviews, and iterative delivery Develop backend features using C# and ASP.NET Core based on product requirements and system designs Design and implement RESTful APIs (controllers, services, DTOs, request/response models) Work with databases (SQL Server / PostgreSQL) including schema design, queries, and optimization Apply OOP principles and clean architecture practices (layered architecture, separation of concerns, SOLID basics) Implement authentication and authorization mechanisms (JWT, role-based access control basics) Handle error management, logging, and validation to ensure robust and predictable APIs Improve backend quality through: Debugging and fixing issues Refactoring for readability, scalability, and maintainability Basic performance improvements (query optimization, caching awareness) Work in a remote workflow: Use Git (branches, commits, pull requests) Participate in code reviews Communicate progress clearly and deliver tasks incrementally Solid knowledge of C# and .NET / ASP.NET Core Understanding of Object-Oriented Programming (encapsulation, inheritance, polymorphism, SOLID basics) Familiarity with REST API design principles Basic knowledge of databases and SQL Strong problem-solving mindset: able to investigate backend issues and debug systematically Comfortable working independently in a remote environment (time management, clear updates) Developed backend features using C# and ASP.NET Core , building RESTful APIs based on product requirements Designed and implemented service-layer architecture following clean architecture principles Built and maintained REST APIs , including request validation, business logic, and structured responses Worked with SQL databases , writing queries and improving data access efficiency Implemented authentication/authorization flows (e.g., JWT-based systems) Improved system reliability through debugging, refactoring, and performance optimizations Collaborated in a remote team workflow using Git, pull requests, and code review feedback Documented API behavior and backend logic to support team collaboration and maintainability Tech: C#, .NET Core, ASP.NET Core, REST APIs, SQL Server/PostgreSQL, Entity Framework Core, OOP, Clean Architecture, Git 📌 Note: This is a compulsory internship and is unpaid. 📩 To apply: Send CV + GitHub/portfolio + backend project examples to taner@bluesense.ai or DM.
